task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the specific project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a project named 'CRISPR Knockout Screen - KRAS' in the SciNote interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the two required experiments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for experiments named 'sgRNA Library Synthesis' and 'Cell Line Engineering' within the project.

task_completion.description: Verify the tasks and sequential workflow in the first experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'sgRNA Library Synthesis' experiment, look for tasks 'Oligo Design and Ordering', 'PCR Amplification', and 'Library Cloning' connected sequentially with arrows (Oligo -> PCR -> Library).

task_completion.description: Verify the tasks and sequential workflow in the second experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Cell Line Engineering' experiment, look for tasks 'Lentiviral Production' and 'Cell Transduction and Selection' connected sequentially with an arrow (Lentiviral -> Cell Transduction).

task_completion.description: Verify the protocol steps in the Lentiviral Production task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Lentiviral Production' task, look for a protocol containing at least 6 distinct steps.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the inventory and its custom columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an inventory/repository named 'CRISPR Screen Reagents' containing the columns 'Supplier', 'Catalog Number', 'Concentration', and 'Storage Temperature'.

task_completion.description: Verify the items added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the items 'Cas9 Protein (SpCas9)', 'sgRNA Library (Pooled)', and 'Polybrene' listed as entries in the 'CRISPR Screen Reagents' inventory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SciNote web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SciNote web application being used in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Protocol steps, tasks, and inventory items should be visible within the SciNote UI elements, not in a separate text editor or console.

integrity.description: Verify no automated scripts were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, curl commands, or database queries being executed to inject the data directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: 'CRISPR Knockout Screen - KRAS'. Experiments: 'sgRNA Library Synthesis' and 'Cell Line Engineering'. Experiment 1 Tasks (Sequential): 'Oligo Design and Ordering' -> 'PCR Amplification' -> 'Library Cloning'. Experiment 2 Tasks (Sequential): 'Lentiviral Production' -> 'Cell Transduction and Selection'. Protocol: 'Lentiviral Production' task must have a protocol with at least 6 steps. Inventory Name: 'CRISPR Screen Reagents'. Inventory Columns: 'Supplier', 'Catalog Number', 'Concentration', 'Storage Temperature'. Inventory Items: 'Cas9 Protein (SpCas9)', 'sgRNA Library (Pooled)', 'Polybrene'.
